items.title: At least 10 people injured in shooting at Mall of Louisiana, police say
items.description: Police said the shooting appeared to have happened after two groups of people got into an argument in the mall's food court.

items.title: Meta to cut 8,000 jobs as it charges into AI
items.description: Meta plans to lay off roughly 10% of its workforce as the technology giant steps up its spending on artificial intelligence.

items.description: interest earnings on a $15,000 money market account can still be significant. Here's what savers need to know now.
